items.previewTitle: Actors Wanted for Court TV – Standing Room Only
items.previewDescription: Actors Wanted! We are seeking non-union talent to portray litigants on syndicated court television series. Stories are based on actual legal cases. Improvisational skills are a plus. This is a PAID acting job. Seeking all ages, races, genders, and looks. Schedule Your Audition Today Register Now
items.title: Actors Wanted for Court TV – Standing Room Only

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 14/2026

DER ERSTE MEGA BLOCKBUSTER  2026 UND DER NEUE ÖSTERREICHISCHE KINOSUPERSTAR IM INTERVIEW 

Der Osterhase bringt passend zur Eiersuche die langersehnte Fortsetzung ins Kino. Mit DER SUPER MARIO GALAXY FILM startet der erste Tophit 2026.

Abseits davon laufen 2 interessante Filme neu an, die Beziehungsstory DAS DRAMA und der neueste Streifen von Jim Jarmusch läuft im Kronenkino Mistelbach an (FATHER MOTHER SISTER BROTHER).

Er ist der neue König an den österreichischen Kinokassen. Mit knapp 450.000 Besuchern schaffte Gery Seidl den zweiterfolgreichsten Film seit 1983. Wir konnten dazu mit ihm ein persönliches Interview führen. 

Vor kurzem verstarb Action Star Chuck Norris, er komponierte zwar keine Musik, er dirigierte den Soundtrack den wir dazu spielen einfach mit Esstäbchen.

Mittwoch 1.4.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text: I’m opening a few spots in my Zoom TV/Film classes for April. Check out ActingMadeEasy and @chelly on Insta.

items.text:
Looking for collaborators on a stylized black-and-white neo-noir short inspired by Sin City and tension-driven dialogue similar to films by Quentin Tarantino.

**Roles needed**:

• Director of Photography

• Editor

• Production Assistants

**Stylized lighting-heavy project

Great for reels

**Fast-paced shoot (1–2 days)

**Shoot Date**: Within the next 2 weeks

**Location**: Riverside / nearby desert area

Looking for a DP and Gaffer to help bring a high-contrast noir short to life  heavy shadows, silhouettes, and stylized lighting.

This is a no-budget passion project, but meals, credit, and footage for reels will be provided. The project focuses heavily on stylized lighting and strong performances.

If interested, please message with your reel or previous work.

Email: Chippiecarcamo@yahoo.com

items.text:
🎬 PA NEEDED – JUPITER, FL (3-DAY SHOOT)

Looking for a reliable and experienced Production Assistant for an upcoming shoot in Jupiter, Florida.

Dates: 

•Thursday, March 26 (approx. half day) 

•Friday, March 27 

•Saturday, March 28

Rate: 

•$275/day

Details: 

•Commercial-style production 

•General PA duties (set support, runs, assisting departments as needed) 

•Must be proactive, communicative, and comfortable in a fast-paced environment

Requirements: 

•Must have reliable transportation 

•Local to South Florida / able to work as a local 

•No gear required

To Apply:

Please email contact@takeflightcinema.com with: 

•Name 

•Contact info 

•Brief experience 

•Availability for all dates

items.text:
CASTING CALL | LUXURY FASHION | DUBAI 🖤

We’re looking for confident, stylish, English-speaking talent for an upcoming luxury fashion shoot in Dubai

_____________________________________

WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

ADULTS 

Men & Women

(Ages 50 to 65 yrs)

Possibly children

(Ages 7 to 12 yrs)

(details shared privately)

Fluent English speakers ONLY 🇬🇧

Camera-ready, polished, confident

Fashion / lifestyle experience a plus (not essential)

________________________________________

📸 THE PROJECT

🖤 Luxury fashion & lifestyle content

📍 Dubai

💻 Digital & social usage

💰 Paid opportunity (400 AED for 2 hours)

👗 Two changes of clothing required

________________________________________

📲 HOW TO APPLY

Please WhatsApp ONLY (no DMs) 📵

📞 +971 50 808 6220

Send:

📌 Name

📌 Recent clear photos (natural light, minimal filters)

📌 Height (adults)

📌 Nationality & languages spoken

📌 Portfolio / IG / experience (if available)

________________________________________

⏳ Shortlisting immediately

🚫 Serious applicants only

sharedPost.text:
Closeness and boundaries are not just mental decisions; they are also experienced physically.
​
In 𝗯𝗼𝗱𝘆 𝗽𝘀𝘆𝗰𝗵𝗼𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝘆, we use body awareness to help restore these capacities and recognise and change automatic relationship patterns.
​
Healthy relationships begin with reconnecting to your own bodily awareness.
​
In Berlin & Online.
​
→ 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲:
https://www.bodymindtherapy.de/en/erstgespraech-stress-emotional-release
.
.
.
#berlintherapy #psychotherapyberlin #somatictherapy #bodypsychotherapy #traumainformedtherapy #mentalhealthberlin #stressreliefberlin #selfregulation #mindbodyconnection #therapyforprofessionals

items.text:
"Min bedstemor og tanter plejede at lave dette, da jeg var ung, men det viste sig, at opskriften aldrig blev skrevet ned. Da jeg spurgte dem om den, kunne de huske ingredienserne, men ikke forholdet, så jeg var begejstret for at finde din opskrift. Smagte præcis som jeg husker det ... måske endda bedre. Enkel og lækker!"

Amish Bagt Vaniljecreme
Opskrift i kommentarerne

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM (*****Me & the Homies*****) – VANCOUVER**

Looking for an actor (Black or Latino, male-presenting, able to play 16–18) for a supporting role in an upcoming independent short film.

**About the Film:**
*Me & the Homies* is a grounded coming-of-age story based on a real night growing up in LA. It follows a group of teenage friends over one night that starts fun and slowly turns darker, exploring loyalty, pressure, and identity.

**Role: “Stats”**
Sharp, observant, and lowkey funny. Stats is always reading the room and calling things out with a dry edge. He feels like one of the guys, but he’s more calculated than he lets on. When things get serious, his instincts kick in, he knows when to push and when to fall back. Strong presence, natural delivery, and subtle performance are key.

**Details:**
* Shoot Dates: April 10, 11 (night shoots)
* Location: Vancouver
* Non-union / Indie / Unpaid (meals + footage provided)

If interested, please send:
* Headshot / recent photo
* Demo reel (if available)
* Age + contact info

Email: mysticstylezfilm@gmail.com

items.text:
The next installment in the My Horrible Roommate Winnie The Pooh series!
My Horrible Lover Winnie The Pooh is the next installment within the series. This will be a short film, rather then a full on feature length film like the last two. This is meant to be somewhat of a filler while also contributing to the ongoing story.

I am looking for a female to play the lover of Pooh. 

Character Description: a women who also has a thing for killing. She has a bad girl attitude, but also has a sweet spot for Pooh.

Age Range, 21 and up.

Location, Fort Collins 

Compensation: None

This will be premiering on YouTube along with the rest of the films. Please send me a message for more info!!

I am also looking for extras to be apart of the kill count as well!!

items.text:
Craxis Studios Casting Call for Indie Film
Title: Despondence

Genre: Coming of Age/Drama

Logline: A sick teenager flees his abusive home in search of freedom, meeting new people as he goes, but as life on the road unravels and the weight of what he left behind begins to close in, he’s forced to confront the truth that some things can’t be outrun.

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Craxis Studios

Contact information: craxisstudios@gmail.com

Run Time: 45min-1hr

Compensation: While monetary compensation currently isn’t possible, the studio hopes that it can be, as of now Compensation will be in Food and Credits. 

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume, and reel if you have one. 

Filming Location: Denver-Aurora 

Project Description: Despondence is a character-driven short film about grief, memory, and the illusion of escape. It follows a teenager who leaves behind a troubled home in search of something better, only to confront the emotional weight of what he can’t outrun. Despondence also being the start of our studio.

Craxis Studios Casting Call for Indie Film
Title: Despondence

Genre: Coming of Age/Drama

Logline: A sick teenager flees his abusive home in search of freedom, meeting new people as he goes, but as life on the road unravels and the weight of what he left behind begins to close in, he’s forced to confront the truth that some things can’t be outrun.

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Craxis Studios

Contact information: craxisstudios@gmail.com

Run Time: 45min-1hr

Compensation: While monetary compensation currently isn’t possible, the studio hopes that it can be, as of now Compensation will be in Food and Credits. 

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume, and reel if you have one. 

Filming Location: Denver-Aurora 

Project Description: Despondence is a character-driven short film about grief, memory, and the illusion of escape. It follows a teenager who leaves behind a troubled home in search of something better, only to confront the emotional weight of what he can’t outrun. Despondence also being the start of our studio.

items.text:
CASTING FOR EU / IRISH PASSPORT HOLDERS ONLY (UK PASSPORT NOT ACCEPTED) 💃 

We are DELIGHTED to announce we are PROVIDING a BRAND NEW ORIGINAL SHOW produced in-house by @tayloremilyfletcher and the team at Taylor Made 🌍

OUR REQUIREMENTS:
-Female Identifying Dancers
-Must be FULLY available from 21st April to 2nd November 
-All dance skills welcomed but MUST have good pick up and choreography retention 

JOB DETAILS:
-TOURING SHOW in 4-5* hotels 
-2 x 40 mins shows MAXIMUM per night
-1 x 30 minute daytime FITNESS / DANCE activity
-6 days per week
-Accommodation, Returns Flights, 2 meals per day in hotels

CASTING REQUIREMENTS:
-CV (no links must be PDF)
-4-5 photos of yourself at present (ideally professional photos but not essential)
-Dance showreel link (must be unlisted YouTube link)
-PLEASE STATE PASSPORT TYPE (Irish, Dual Citizenship, Spanish etc) 

To apply, please email info@taylormadeglobal.co.uk with the relevant materials - subject heading: EU SHOWTEAM

items.text:
✨ WE’RE HIRING ✨
Happily Ever After Princesses is looking for magical new performers to join our royal team! 👑

Do you love bringing fairytales to life? We’re on the lookout for talented, reliable, and passionate performers who can sing, sparkle, and make dreams come true.

📩 To apply, please send the following to happilyeverafterprincesses1@gmail.com:

💫 Your CV

🎤 A singing reel

📸 A recent headshot

Applications are now open — we can’t wait to meet our next princess! 💕

#PrincessPerformer #CastingCall #NowHiring #PrincessJobs #happilyeverafterprincessparties

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'WE ARE HIRING ARE YOU A PERFORMER OR CREATIE LOOKING FOR PERFORMANCE ORMANCE WORK? WE ARE LOOKING FOR EXTREMELY TALENTED INDIVIDUALS WHO ARE PASSIONATE THEIR CRAFT. WE ARE SEEKING FOR NEW PRINCESS PERFORMERS to PROVIDE MAGICAL AND ENCHANTING PERFORMANCES FOR OUR CLIENTS. 기 MUST POSSESS CONFIDENCE, BE OUTGOING, AND BE COMFORTABLE SPEAKING ON A MICROPHONE ABILITY TO ACT PLAYFULLY AND SHOW ENTHUSIASM WHILE ENGAGING WITH CHILDREN CONFIDENCE IN PERFORMING SOLO GIGS MUST HAVE A DBS CHECK MUST BE ABLE to DRIVE SHOULD HAVE A STRONG AMERICAN ACCENT AND THE ABILITY TO SING •AGES 21 AND OVER ONLY'

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in adult beginners! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

message.text:
TikTok is a GOATED tool for marketing research. 

I’ve been working with Dig Projects on some real people castings over the past few months, mixing my love of field producing with consumer behavior, and because of TikToks that I’ve made (like this), each paid project has been getting 300+ Google form submissions within the first few days alone. 

The number of passionate individuals I’ve been getting to meet — and who sometimes fall into really specific demographics — has been astounding, but really just shows how connected we all can be. 

As problematic as social media is sometimes, that truly is a beautiful upside. 🍻

That said… if you know of any Gen Z pancake/baking enthusiasts in Chicago… please fill out this form (or share and get that referral fee 💸)!

https://lnkd.in/gtSnWbjs

#marketingresearch #consumerbehavior #fieldproducing #castingcall #chicago #tiktok

items.text:
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms and entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere & Virdee. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT
The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging
- Family dynamics & generational conflict
- Love, relationships & marriage
- Crime & survival in urban environments
- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects
- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.
The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. 

Age Range: 

Open to all age groups
Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:
Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements
upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued
with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.
❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:
Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing
Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. 

E-Mail: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements
upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued
with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.
❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:
Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing
Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. 

E-Mail: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com
items.title: A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms and entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere & Virdee. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture.

items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Casting Call!!!

“Two pairs of Legs, Lennon and Lindsey embrace the challenging journey to explore if their continuous encounters really are just coincidences.”

Hello!  That was the logline of my short film which I’m currently directing called Legs! I am a student studying Film Practice at University Of the Arts London. 

Legs is a comedy based around a pair of Legs! Set in present day London we explore the nature of the invisible string theory. The film has heavy inspiration from Wes Anderson, LaLaLand, and the silent era. 

We are currently seeking two male dancers to take upon the role of Lennon (the main lead) and the ex-partner of the female lead (the antagonist). 

Legs is a dialogue free film due to its heavy inspiration from the silent era. Due to this these roles require actors to move very expressively with their legs, as the legs are the entire character's personality, emotions, and identity.

We will be shooting the film from the 23rd to the 30th of April. So, we ask to keep those days as available if you are interested. 

We are also seeking 2 voice actors, the male and female lead which will be crucial to communicate the emotions via non-verbal vocalisations. 

We will be recording voice acting the week after shooting.

If interested in more than just acting or just voice acting feel free to apply for both positions!

Most locations will be shot in the London borough of Southwark and food and travel will be covered. However, we have a very limited budget, so we are not able to pay any actors beyond that.  

But this will be a great opportunity to expand your portfolio, and work on a production where you will get to challenge yourself with something potentially new to you!

If you are interested contact me via this post or email my producer :

I.pugh0320251@arts.ac.uk

Instagram: @iolopzs

items.text:
Urgent Casting Call - Unpaid- Student Project
Chapman AP - Muddy D

Genre: Comedy/ drama/ Mocumentary. 

Shooting date: April 17th – 19th

Logline: A delusional aspiring artist documents his own rise to fame in a self-made documentary—only to discover that his growing audience is laughing at him, forcing him to question his identity and whether to keep creating. 

Derek / 20-40 /  An aspiring “creative” who believes he’s on the brink of recognition, performing under the persona “Muddy D” with unshakable confidence. Beneath the ego is a deeply vulnerable man forced to confront the gap between his self-image and reality—and decide whether to keep creating anyway.

Mom / 30-80 / Derek’s mother. Warm, practical, and grounded in reality, she genuinely cares about her son and has supported him throughout his life. She has witnessed his creativity since childhood and still holds onto that version of him, even if she no longer fully understands what he is trying to become.

Linda / 30-80 / A regular at the dive bar. Observant, blunt, and unintentionally harsh. She represents the outside world’s honest (and often dismissive) perception of Derek.

Credit, meal and copy and gas comp provide

Non-union

Photo and reels to submit 

DM or email to zmao@chapman.edu

CREW CALL: PRODUCTION ASSISTANTS – FASHION SHOW VENDOR OPPORTUNITY

#MAGEMotionPictures is seeking reliable and detail-oriented Production Assistants for an upcoming fashion show vendor opportunity.  Actors/Actresses are encouraged to apply.  

Date: Sunday, April 19th  
Time: 1:00 PM – 9:00 PM  
(May end sooner; full day rate will still be honored)

Location:  
Details will be provided upon signing of contract

Wardrobe / Dress Code:  
Business Casual Required
- Women: Combination colors of red, pink, and/or purple
- Men: All black with red, pink, or purple accent colors
- Overall appearance should remain clean, polished, and professional

Responsibilities May Include:
- Assisting with vendor setup and breakdown  
- Supporting backstage operations and coordination  
- Managing product flow and display areas  
- Providing general on-site production support  

Ideal Candidates:
- Punctual, professional, and proactive  
- Able to work in a fast-paced, high-energy environment  
- Strong communication and organizational skills  
- Prior event or production experience is a plus (but not required)

Compensation:  
Paid – Full day rate guaranteed

To Apply / Inquire:  
Email K. Dixon at kdmagestudio@gmail.com TODAY with your name, contact information, and any relevant experience.

Serious inquiries only. Let’s execute excellence.

CASTING OPEN — THE ASK (RTN Raleigh)

We’re looking for real people with powerful, unforgettable life stories.

Not perfect stories.
Not polished ones.
Real ones.

If you’ve been through something that changed you —
this is your moment to be heard.

🎥 The Ask is a TV project airing on RTN (Raleigh Television Network).

📍 Filming takes place in Raleigh, North Carolina
📩 Send your story to: theaskoffice@gmail.com

Tell us who you are.
Tell us what you’ve been through.
Tell us why your story matters.

We’re not looking for “content”.
We’re looking for something real.

This is a fantastic opportunity for individuals interested in honing their skills in 𝙨𝙞𝙣𝙜𝙞𝙣𝙜, 𝙙𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙞𝙣𝙜, 𝙖𝙘𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜, 𝙢𝙤𝙙𝙚𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙜, 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙏𝙑 𝙝𝙤𝙨𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜. 𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨 𝐑𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫:

CHER PÈRE NOËL… CASTING ENFANTS
Pour le prochain long-métrage de James Huth (Le nouveau jouet, Brice de Nice), produit par Les Films sur Mesure et SND.
Elsa Pharaon recherche des enfants entre 7 et 10 ans :
ZARA
Une petite puce intrépide et créative
SA BANDE
Des filles et des garçons vifs et curieux
Toutes origines bienvenues.
Tournage en France et en Belgique prévu début 2025.
Si dans votre entourage vous connaissez des enfants prêts à se laisser emporter par la magie de Noël, n'hésitez pas à les guider vers le formulaire de candidature !
Merci de postuler via le QR code ou via le lien suivant : https://unlockcasting.com/usp_form/cher-pere-noel/
Si votre enfant est déjà inscrit sur la plate-forme Unlockcasting vous pouvez nous adresser UNE NOUVELLE SELFTAPE (pour mettre à jour son profil) avec comme objet son "NOM prénom Selftape pour CHER PÈRE NOËL" sur ce mail castingcherperenoel@gmail.com

items.text:
🎬 Casting-Aufruf für Kurzfilm – Kinder (10–12 Jahre) 🎬

Für die Produktion eines emotionalen Kurzfilms suche ich Kinder im Alter von ca. 10–12 Jahren, die eine Schulklasse darstellen.

Gesucht werden:

•⁠  ⁠ca. 5–6 Kinder für Haupt-/Nebenrollen (mit mehr Screentime)

•⁠  ⁠weitere Kinder als Komparsen für Klassenszenen

Wichtig für die Besetzung:

Für die Hauptrollen wird ein heller, eher europäischer Typ bevorzugt (z. B. blonde oder hellhaarige Kinder), da dies zum visuellen Konzept des Films passt.  

Mädchen und Jungen sind gleichermaßen willkommen.

Drehdetails:

📍 Raum NRW (Recklinghausen)  

📅 Drehzeitraum: April

🎥 Erfahrung ist kein Muss – Natürlichkeit und Ausstrahlung stehen im Vordergrund  

Vergütung:

Aufwandsentschädigung + Verpflegung am Set

Bewerbung:

Bitte per PN:

•⁠  ⁠Name & Alter des Kindes  

•⁠  ⁠2–3 aktuelle Fotos  

•⁠  ⁠Wohnort  

•⁠  ⁠(optional) kurze Vorstellung / Erfahrung  

Ich freue mich auf eure Nachrichten! 🙌  

Gerne teilen!

items.text:
Иногда, чтобы начать — достаточно просто найти своё место.

Варшава, Конструкторская, 6.
Музыкальная студия, где звук становится формой.
Записать трек.
Собраться на репетицию.
Поймать тот самый момент, когда всё звучит «как надо».
Здесь есть всё оборудование но главное, здесь есть пространство для тебя и твоего звука. Без лишнего шума.
С правильной атмосферой.
Удивительное рядом.
Może właśnie na Konstruktorskiej

items.text:
🎬 CASTING: Rola Trenerki do filmu „Tombé”
NON PROFIT 
Poszukujemy aktorki do kluczowej roli Trenerki w studenckiej etiudzie filmowej realizowanej na zaliczenie roku. Projekt ma charakter artystyczny i jest przygotowywany z myślą o obiegu festiwalowym.

O FILMIE:
„Tombé” to mroczna opowieść o baletnicy uwięzionej w pułapce perfekcjonizmu. To thriller o przekraczaniu granic wytrzymałości i toksycznej relacji mistrz-uczeń.

KOGO SZUKAMY?
 Rola: Trenerka (kobieta, wiek ok. 40–60 lat).
 Charakterystyka: Postać posągowa, chłodna, operująca minimalnym gestem i świdrującym spojrzeniem. To ona jest architektem sukcesu i jednocześnie źródłem cierpienia głównej bohaterki.
 Szukamy osoby o silnej charyzmie, która potrafi zagrać „ciszą” i autorytetem.

LOGISTYKA:
 Termin zdjęć: 2 maja 2026 (sobota).
 Miejsce: Starachowice (Park Kultury).

ZAPEWNIAMY:
 Wysokiej jakości materiał do portfolio (showreela).
 Pełny catering i napoje na planie.
 
ZGŁOSZENIA:
Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o zgłoszenie się na maila filmtombe@gmail.com

items.text:
SZUKAMY AKTORA (20-25 LAT) (ŁOMŻA I OKOLICE) NON-PROFIT
Szukam aktora do głównej roli projektu dyplomowego, 3-minutowy zwiastun oraz 2-3 plakaty promocyjne.

Zwiastun i plakaty są do fikcyjnego filmu, horroru psychologicznego, inspirowany filmami typu „Jacob’s Ladder” Adriana Lyne’a, „Vanilla sky” oraz grami z serii Silent hill. Ma być mrocznie, niepokojąco.

ROLA: 

August Nowosielski- młody student psychologii, straumatyzowany, skryty w sobie, lecz zdeterminowany do odkrycia prawdy.

Początek prac nad projektem zaczyna się we wrześniu-październiku.

O więcej informacji zapraszam na priv ;P

items.text:
🎭 CHARACTER BREAKDOWN

When Momma Didn’t Protect Me

⸻

🧒🏾 YOUTH ROLES (Ages 8–17)

LATRICE (15)

Guarded. Observant. A natural leader who doesn’t trust easily.
She reads people quickly and knows how to survive systems that were never built to protect her. She doesn’t start off loud—but when she sees something wrong, she refuses to stay silent. Carries quiet anger and deep hurt.

⸻

NIA (17)

The oldest in the shelter. Tough, sharp-tongued, and protective.
She leads with strength but uses control and intimidation as a coping mechanism. Beneath that is fear of being abandoned and aging out with nowhere to go.

⸻

DEVON (16)

Quick-witted, sarcastic, and emotionally guarded.
He uses humor to deflect pain and rarely shows vulnerability. Observant and intelligent, but avoids getting too close to people.

⸻

KEISHA (15)

Bold, expressive, and full of personality.
She brings energy into the room and keeps things from getting too heavy, but her humor masks deep emotional wounds.

⸻

MARCUS (16)

Quiet. Thoughtful. Always watching.
Processes everything internally and often expresses himself through drawing or writing. He sees more than he says.

⸻

TAMARA (11)

Nurturing and wise beyond her years—but still a child.
She tries to take care of others, especially the younger kids, but she still needs protection herself. Looks up to the older teens for guidance.

⸻

RILEY (10)

Anxious, particular, and detail-oriented.
Tries to create order in a chaotic environment. Sensitive to tension and easily overwhelmed, but perceptive.

⸻

ELIJAH (12)

Energetic, funny, and full of personality.
Often the comic relief, but uses humor to cope with fear and instability. Loyal to the group.

⸻

JAYDEN (8)

Sensitive, quiet, and deeply affected.
The youngest. Carries something he doesn’t fully understand how to express. His silence holds weight, and when he speaks, it matters.

⸻

👩🏾‍💼 ADULT ROLES

MS. DANIELS (30s–50s)

Firm, compassionate, and trauma-informed.
She genuinely cares about the kids and understands the system is broken. She tries to do what she can, but knows she cannot save everyone—and that weighs on her.

⸻

MS. WHITAKER (30s–50s)

Well-meaning but dangerously naive.
Believes most parents “do their best” and struggles to accept that adults intentionally harm children. Her denial puts kids at risk.

⸻

MR. CARTER (30s–50s)

Bitter, strict, and emotionally disconnected.
Burned out by the system. Sees kids as manipulative and difficult. Hides behind rules and paperwork—but there’s more to him than meets the eye.

⸻

DR. HARRIS (30s–50s)

Emotionally detached therapist from an affluent background.
Clinical, distant, and struggles to connect with the kids. Lacks empathy and carries unconscious bias that impacts how he views them.

⸻

MR. LOWE (30s–50s)

Calm, soft-spoken, and unsettling.
Presents as helpful and attentive but uses that to manipulate. His behavior is subtle, controlled, and inappropriate—never overtly shown, but deeply felt.

⸻

ADULT LATRICE (30s–40s)

Narrator. Reflective but still unresolved.
She carries the weight of her childhood and tells the story without softening it. She does not offer easy answers.

⸻

🎭 TONE NOTE FOR ACTORS

This is a dramatic, emotionally layered production that requires:

✔ strong emotional control
✔ ability to handle heavy subject matter
✔ authenticity over overacting
✔ real connection to the material

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL! VIRTUAL AUDITIONS WHEN MOMMA DIDN'T PROTECT ME A Stage Play by Glennette Nelson SEEKING ACTORS YOUTH (AGES 8-17) ADULTS (30s-50s) ADULT ROLES: YOUTH ROLES: •Latrice, Nia, Devon, Keisha, Marcus, Tamara, •Riley, Elijah, Jayden Ms. Daniels Mr. Carter Ms. Whitaker Dr. Harris Mr. Lowe Adult Latrice SUBMIT YOUR AUDITION VIDEO TO: brokenforpurpose1@ @gmail.com •1-2MIN ·1-2 MIN DRAMATIC MONOLOGUE OR PROVIDED SCRIPT SIDES REAL. RAW. POWERFUL DRAMA. BROKEN FOR PURPOSE THEATRE'

items.text:
WANTED 
REWARD: A Summer For The History Books
 Dead or alive (but preferably alive)!
 
Wild West City is scouting for the toughest, friendliest, and most reliable cowboys and cowgirls to join our 2026 team! 
 
We Seek:
 • Show Stoppers (Performers & Actors)
 • Gold- Miners (Retail & Guest Services)
 • Chuckwagon Chefs  (Food & Beverage)
 • Wranglers (Stable Hands)
 • Ranch Hands (Grounds & Maintenance)
Join us at our Group Hiring Event!
Fast-Track to the Frontier: Meet our managers, learn about our available positions and get interviewed on the spot.
No Experience? No Problem: We provide all the training you need. (Position Dependent) 
 
Event Details:
📅 When: April 11, 2026 
⏰ Time: 11:00 a.m. - 1:00 p.m.
📍 Where:  Wild West City 
                    50 Lackawanna Dr, Stanhope, NJ 07874
 
How to join: Just show up with a copy of your resume (digital or paper)! You can also pre-register here to skip the line by scanning the QR code below.
Bring a friend and come see what we're all about!
 
Happy Trails, 
The Wild West City Team

items.text:
CASTING CALL – CATWOMAN SHORT FILM (LOS ANGELES)

An upcoming independent short film is now casting for the lead role of Catwoman.

Role: Catwoman  
Gender: Female  
Age Range: 18–25  
Ethnicity: Open to all backgrounds  
Location: Los Angeles area  

This is a paid role. Transport and catering will be fully covered for all selected talent.

We are looking for a confident, expressive performer who can embody Catwoman’s agility, charm, and unpredictability. Prior acting experience is preferred but not essential.

To Apply:  
Please send your CV, headshots, and any relevant showreel material to eganmaddi1@gmail.com  

For further details or to express interest, DM @jaidenfilms_1 on Instagram  

Filming dates and exact locations will be shared with shortlisted applicants.

Join us in bringing an iconic character to life in a bold and stylised short film.

items.text:
🚨 AKUT CASTING – vi mangler skuespillere til i morgen! 🚨 Hej alle!
Vi er en gruppe gymnasieelever i 3.G, der er i gang med vores elevproduktion, og desværre er nogle af vores skuespillere sprunget fra i sidste øjeblik – så vi mangler AKUT folk!

🎭 Vi søger 3 roller:

 • Christian – hovedrollens kæreste

 • Rank – Christians ven

 • Vega – hovedrollens veninde

👥 Derudover søger vi også statister!

🎉 Scene: Det er en festscene, så du skal møde op i festtøj. Viben er lidt “Nordsjælland”-miljø.

📍 Location: Hvidovre

📅 Optagedage:

 • 27. marts (i morgen!) kl. 19:00–23:00

 • 2., 3. og 4. april (ikke sikkert alle dage bruges, men sæt gerne tid af)

💸 OBS: Det er en low budget elevproduktion, så der er desværre ikke løn – men til gengæld får du erfaring, optagelser til showreel og en fed oplevelse!

Hvis du har lyst til at være med (eller kender nogen der har!), så skriv hurtigst muligt 🙏

Vi håber virkelig, nogen kan hjælpe med kort varsel – det ville betyde mega meget for os! ❤️

topComments.text: Awesome! If you wanna be an extra sign up with an extra (supporting artist) agency. With your skills perhaps a Spact (special action extra) agency is best. If you wanna be a lead you will need to get some acting skills under your belt

Drop the wheel clamper bit 
Everyone hates them more than tragic cops and traffic wardens. 
Good luck with the journey

items.text:
🎬 CASTING: Rola Trenerki do filmu „Tombé”
NON PROFIT 
Poszukujemy aktorki do kluczowej roli Trenerki w studenckiej etiudzie filmowej realizowanej na zaliczenie roku. Projekt ma charakter artystyczny i jest przygotowywany z myślą o obiegu festiwalowym.

O FILMIE:
„Tombé” to mroczna opowieść o baletnicy uwięzionej w pułapce perfekcjonizmu. To thriller o przekraczaniu granic wytrzymałości i toksycznej relacji mistrz-uczeń.

KOGO SZUKAMY?
 Rola: Trenerka (kobieta, wiek ok. 40–60 lat).
 Charakterystyka: Postać posągowa, chłodna, operująca minimalnym gestem i świdrującym spojrzeniem. To ona jest architektem sukcesu i jednocześnie źródłem cierpienia głównej bohaterki.
 Szukamy osoby o silnej charyzmie, która potrafi zagrać „ciszą” i autorytetem.

LOGISTYKA:
 Termin zdjęć: 2 maja 2026 (sobota).
 Miejsce: Starachowice (Park Kultury).

ZAPEWNIAMY:
 Wysokiej jakości materiał do portfolio (showreela).
 Pełny catering i napoje na planie.
 
ZGŁOSZENIA:
Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o zgłoszenie się na maila filmtombe@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, beard and text that says 'xxx 2 stawka 10-15tys szukamy do reklamy LEKU: tęgi mężczyzna około 40 lat. Waga go postarza. Próbuje zapanować nad sylwetką jest aktywny ale do tej pory mu nie wychodzi. Masa zaczyna go ograniczać fizycznie emocjonalnie. Będzie grał w koszykówkę- nie musi być wymiataczem super umieć ale chodzi o to że na planie kilka razy będzie musiał to powtórzyć. ZGŁOSZENIA DO 6 KWIETNIA 2026 CASTING@STARTSTUDIO.PL wybrane osoby dostaną dalsze wytyczne'

items.text:
POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY Z PRAWEM JAZDY
Objazdowy Teatr Magiczna Scena szuka zdolnych osób do udziału w spektaklach teatralnych wystawianych dla dzieci. Praca wyjazdowa od poniedziałku do piątku. Wykształcenie aktorskie nie jest wymagane. Wystarczy dobra dykcja i pozytywna energia. Zapewniamy noclegi na cały tydzień i samochód służbowy. Zarobki na poziomie 4500 - 6000 zł netto miesięcznie. 

Prosimy wysyłać zgłoszenia na: rekrutacja@magicznascena.pl lub telefonicznie 664-873-817

https://www.youtube.com/@MagicznaScena/videos

https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61555960334876
items.previewDescription: Współpracujemy z placówkami oświaty, bibliotekami, domami kultury, aresztami i innymi podmiotami pracującymi z młodzieżą w róznym wieku. Zajmujemy się tworzeniem warsztatów, szkoleń oraz spektakli i widowisk art. o tematyce profilaktyczno-wychowawczej

Short Film Casting Call!
Hey, all! Four Horsemen & Co and Stage Zed Entertainment are producing a new short film in the Metro Detroit area that’ll be shooting at the end of April.

We are casting for four roles! Please see the casting flyer for information. Metro Detroit-based is preferred. Let us know if you have any questions!

We could put out a sponsored post... I'm working with two studios... 

A VOD Cast Studio & a Music Studio both have clients on TV and Universal... 

Both seem to like the idea and the music studio said they are looking for people too... 

Basically we could start a Twitch account for you unless you're in London...

Or either a Go Fund Me to take donations while streaming the studio session live

In collaboration with other live Streaming Platforms...

We could even use PayPal as well. Telegram has Credits to buy pictures and things

Tippers/Donators/Customers can suggest lines for writing credits in the song... 

Submit beats.. 
Offer Executive Production suggestions... 
Stylist ideas and fashion designs... Music Video Directions...

Etc

items.text:
Hiya!

In need of some new faces for our shoots this week - you must be Leeds based or local and close to Leeds.

10-15 minutes of your time and a paid opportunity - please email me joanna@culturacreative.com if you would like to take part!

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'Cultura Creative We' re looking for individuals ageo 18+ to participate in short, professional portrait sessions. 15-20 minute shoot •Paid opportunity No prior experience needed ·Images remain private (not used publicly) Model release required MODELS WANTED Interested? Get touch to reserve your spot. Contact shoots.@culturacreative.com for more information and to secure your spot while availability lasts.'

items.title: Hiya!

items.text:
‼️ UWAGA GÓRNY ŚLĄSK ‼️
Zapraszamy do udziału w fabularnym serialu kryminalnym, realizowanym na terenie Górnego Śląska. 🔥 Gwarantujemy fajną zabawę i świetną atmosferę - SERDECZNIE ZAPRASZAMY❗️

Jeśli masz mocny, charakterystyczny wygląd — to może być coś dla Ciebie.

❇️ KOGO ZAPRASZAMY: groźne wyglądających Panów (w wieku ok. 35-55 lat), mile widziane tatuaże i umięśnienie, mogą być także blizny (do zagrania są 3 sceny, plan dzienny).

✅ KIEDY i GDZIE:

31.03 (wt.), plan w MIKOŁOWIE (10 min spacerem od dworca PKP).

💰WYNAGRODZENIE za udział w planie:  300 zł netto, płatne po planie.

⬇️ KOMPLETNE ZGŁOSZENIE zawierające poniższe dane, wyślij:

📲 WhatsApp / SMS: +48 660 543 967

📩 e-mail: 123cast.serial@gmail.com

📌 Tytuł zgłoszenia: „Areszt 31.03”

W mailu / komunikatorze podaj wszystkie poniższe dane, dokładnie wg. tej formatki ⬇️:

—

* Imię i nazwisko

* Nr telefonu

* E-mail

* Miejsce zamieszkania

* Datę urodzenia

* Wzrost (cm)

* Wagę (kg)

* Rozmiar obuwia (EU)

📸 Dołącz 2 aktualne zdjęcia:

* portret;

* sylwetka.

Zdjęcia powinny być zrobione telefonem:

❌ bez innych osób w kadrze;

❌ bez okularów;

❌ bez nakrycia głowy.

⚠️  UWAGA, odezwiemy się do wybranych w procesie castingowym osób.

Do zobaczenia na planie 🎬

—

𝘗𝘩𝘰𝘵𝘰 𝘣𝘺 𝘔𝘪𝘭𝘢𝘥 𝘍𝘢𝘬𝘶𝘳𝘪𝘢𝘯 𝘰𝘯 𝘜𝘯𝘴𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘴𝘩, 𝘮𝘢𝘥𝘦 𝘣𝘺 𝘌𝘔.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Przygoda na planie filmowym Panowie lat) 23Ca5 Ecac 123Cast by Groźnie w wie aU ok. with Created Stawka: 300 zł netto 31.03.2026 2026 Mikołów'

sharedPost.text:
Writers — quick note.

We’re launching a new screenwriting application called Scriptovate — designed to bring writing, structure, and AI-powered feedback into one place.

We’re currently offering a limited number of discounted early access spots before launch.

If you’d like to pre-sign up, click the link below.

subscribepage.io/scriptovate

Thanks!

Alex

message.text:
Was für ein besonderer Tag ✨
INTAKO Düsseldorf – Stimmtraining für Tanzlehrer:innen.

In kürzester Zeit konnten die einzelnen Teilnehmer:innen – und die ganze Gruppe – spüren, wie kleine muskuläre Veränderungen große stimmliche Veränderungen bewirken. Genau diese Aha-Momente berühren mich jedes Mal aufs Neue: wenn Menschen ihre Stimme bewusster einsetzen, mehr Präsenz gewinnen und entdecken, was wirklich in ihr steckt.

Ich durfte als Speakerin auf der Bühne stehen – ein voller Saal, unglaublich viel Interaktion. Besonders berührt hat mich, wie viele Teilnehmende sich direkt vor der Gruppe gemeldet haben, um mit mir zu arbeiten und ihre Stimme auszuprobieren. So viel Mut, Offenheit und Vertrauen 💛

Und am Ende: Standing Ovations.
Ich bin noch ganz erfüllt und dankbar für diesen intensiven Austausch.

#INTAKO #Stimmtraining #Tanzlehrer #Düsseldorf #speakerforvoice @intakoopen.intako

Hello, we are casting for a PAID medical commercial shoot. Two actors for a half day of filming, indoors, with flexible dates. Please see information below for submission details. Age range is flexible as well.

Selected actors will also be offered additional paid roles this month for other medical commercials we have booked. 

SUBMISSION LINK: https://forms.gle/pWBySBNCwMfuwSEM9

Pay fast, client amazing, and the shoot on white cyc studio indoors. Please use this Submission Link read sides and submit your tape! Casting Call For Student Short Film
Hey! My name is Quentin Diaz, and I’m a high-school student filmmaker at Denver School of the Arts. I’m casting a 5-minute drama short!

**Title**: Silver Moon

**Genre**: Drama

**Logline**: An aging darkroom enthusiast reconnects with his distant daughter, finally confronting their deteriorating relationship.

**Role**: The daughter, Martha. Mid-30s

**Compensation**: *No Compensation besides meals*

**Shooting** **Dates**: April 18 & April 19

**Location**: Denver, CO

Contact me if you’re interested!

Quentin Diaz

[801896@dpsk12.net](mailto:801896@dpsk12.net)

items.text:
SUBMISSIONS CLOSED. Thank you to all who submitted!

INDEPENDENT FEATURE FILM CASTING CALL:

Genre: Existential horror

Title: Beyond Now 

Logline: A group of close-knit friends get together for one last hurrah. What awaits them are horrors that will change their lives in ways they could never prepare for.

Production company: Bench-Top Productions 

Contact info: beyondnowproduction@protonmail.com

IMPORTANT NOTE: These roles have hard shoot dates over April, May, and October. If submitting please confirm full availability for the dates listed for each specific role. The audition deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline. 

ROLES:

Hailey, Lead female: Early to Mid 30’s

Mom of the group. Overly Responsible. Protective of her friends and family. Cautious about her partner Ethan’s Anxiety. Hailey organized this trip as a final ‘hurrah’ to announce her pregnancy.

Shoot dates: 4/9, 4/10, 4/13, 4/14, 4/17, 4/18, 4/19, 4/20, 4/21, 5/9, 5/10, 5/11, 5/12, 5/16, 10/16, 10/17, 10/18 

Brooke, Supporting female: Late 20’s - Early 30’s 

Wannabe Instagram influencer. Super jealous of her friend Megan and her “so-called career.” One of the class clowns of the group. She has a ‘Team Rocket Jesse and James’ dynamic with her best friend Chris from their years working together in a coffee shop. Strongly copes with humor. Hyperfixates on her special interests: photography, true crime and mystics.

Shoot dates: 4/10, 4/13, 4/14, 4/18, 4/19, 4/20, 5/7, 5/10, 10/16, 10/17, 10/18 

Compensation: IMDB credit, meal and reel. 

Union status: Non-union

Shoot locations: Conifer, Golden and Denver CO

AUDITION INFORMATION: Auditions will be held via selftape. To receive sides and selftape instructions, please send a headshot, resume and reel to beyondnowproduction@protonmail.com with which role you're submitting for and a confirmation of availability for the dates listed for that role. The deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline. 

IMDB: [[https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2)](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2)

items.text:
Mellem to øjeblikke (Kortfilm)
Mellem to øjeblikke (Kortfilm)SKUESPILLERE ELLER KAMAREMAND SØGES TIL KORTFILM I VEJLE 🎬

Vi søger en ung skuespillere eller en kamaremand til en kortfilm, der skal optages i Vejle.

Roller vi søger: en Ung kvinde – alder 18–21 år. Vi ser gerne, at du har lidt skuespilerfaring, men det vigtigste er, at du har lyst til at være med i et kreativt filmprojekt. 

Optagelser: Vejle📍 Dato📅 oplyses ved henvendelse så vi kan planlægge det sammen:)

Praktisk info: Projektet er ulønnet, men der vil være mad og snacks på settet, og du får en fed oplevelse med filmproduktion samt mulighed for at udvide dit netværk. 

Interesseret Send en besked med:• Navn• Alder• Et billede af dig selv• Eventuel skuespilerfaringVi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎥

items.text:
Har du god energi på kamera og elsker shopping, hverdagsinspiration og formidling? 📸 Så er det måske dig, vi leder efter som vært til City 2’s sociale medier.

Vi søger 1 vært, der har lyst til at være ansigtet udadtil på City 2’s kanaler og formidle content på en naturlig og imødekommende måde. Vi står for optagelse, redigering og alt det praktiske – du skal blot være ansigtet udadtil og får et færdigt script med det, der skal siges.

Om rollen:
• Medvirken i månedligt content til TikTok, Instagram og Facebook.
• Frekvens: Optages én gang om måneden.
• Optagelser foregår i City 2 Shoppingcenter.
• Tidsrum: kl. 13–16.
• Content bruges både organisk og til paid annoncering. Organisk annoncering er gratis opslag, der vises naturligt til følgere og andre brugere. Paid annoncering er opslag, man betaler for, så de vises til flere og udvalgte målgrupper.
• Script sendes på forhånd, så der er god tid til forberedelse.

Vi leder efter dig, der:
• Har god energi og er naturlig på kamera.
• Har en imødekommende og troværdig udstråling.
• Er tryg ved at tale til kamera og skabe nærvær.
• Er fleksibel og kan indgå i en løbende content-plan.
• Har erfaring fra lignende opgaver (bare en bonus)

Praktisk info.:
• Løn på dagsbasis

Sådan søger du:
• Send mig en kort video (30–60 sek.), hvor du formidler et valgfrit budskab til kamera – fx om noget, du holder af, dig selv eller en hverdagsoplevelse. MAIL: Simone@beyond11.dk.

👉 Går du med en vært gemt i maven 
– eller kender du én, der kunne være et godt match? Så hører vi meget gerne fra dig.

items.text: New Zoom Classes Begin (Tues, 4/7, Saturday, 4/11) Renee Garcia 4 Week Zoom Acting Intensive Workshop. Behind the scenes with students of the acting class: Jamie Aronson Casie Lew Nancy Sharma Jaimie Confer-Curtis Shannon Mercado Renee Garcia, an award-winning Casting Director, Renee Garcia Casting, Director, Immigrant Mother, and Producer based in Los Angeles. Zoom classes are for all ages, with kids and adults learning and training together, learning what it takes to book roles in Hollywood. IG: reneegarciafilmmaker DM for my classes.  @highlight @followers @

🚨 OFFICIAL DATES RELEASED 🚨

Oh yes… we’re BACK! 🔥

Following an overwhelming number of applications over the past few weeks, we’re excited to officially announce that Talent Search UK is returning once again with a brand new production — and the dates are HERE! 👇

This is your early announcement, so make sure you lock it in and get ready for something bigger, better, and more competitive than ever before. 💥

✨ After the huge success of our last series — and seeing so many of our discovered talents go on to achieve incredible things — the search is ON once again…

⭐ We are looking for the NEXT UK SUPERSTAR ⭐

Could that be YOU? 👀

🎤 Real success
🚀 Real opportunity
🌟 Real talent

If you’re ready to take your shot, don’t wait…

👉 Apply now: www.talentsearchuk.com

Secure your place in the next production TODAY!

#TalentSearchUK #OfficialDates #ApplyNow #NextSuperstar #UKTalent #BigOpportunity #LiveShow

items.text: I'm so very proud of my team. We started not so long ago with just me and Tom. We now have a thriving team. I am so grateful to groups like this and the talented people here. Let me know what you think of our trailer! Edited by my second in command Tom Sharkey.

sharedPost.text:
I'm so very happy with the trailer edited by my boy Tom Sharkey. His skills as an editor have grown so much. 

The trailer for Toxic the Full Shabang is here. 

Thank you to all the actresses involved and all the crew you helped this movie come to life.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – LONDON (PAID)

Looking for a confident, outgoing person to be the face of a street-style interview series for TikTok.

You’ll be:
• Approaching people
• Asking fun / engaging questions
• Comfortable on camera

This is NOT traditional acting — more presenter / personality.

Details:
• 2–3 hour shoot
• £80–£100 paid
• London location

Ideal for:
• Drama students
• Aspiring presenters
• Content creators

Must have:
• Strong energy
• Natural speaking style
• Not afraid to talk to strangers

To apply:
Send a short video (30–60 secs) introducing yourself as if you're interviewing someone.

Potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit.

topComments.text: Hi what sort of interview is this? Could I have more information
Do you have to be over 18?

items.text:
Seattle WA
FlightTime Productions proudly presents auditions for the upcoming Short Film:

                     Amelia, Once More

We are seeking cast members of all kinds: adult men, women and children. Must be 16+ to audition for the production. 

Non-Union Actors Only!

Auditions are by appointment only:

Friday, April 3rd, 2026

12PM, 1PM, 2PM, 3PM & 4PM

To sign up for a free audition appointment, please email an updated copy of your headshot and acting resume to ameliastageplay@gmail.com. Please also list two available audition times you are available to audition at.

Auditions will be held at:

Seattle Public Library- Ballard Branch

5614 22nd Ave. N.W. 

Seattle, WA 98107

*This event is NOT hosted, sponsored, or endorsed by The Seattle Public Library*

For auditions, please prepare a 1-minute monologue of your choice. Preferably a comedic or dramatic monologue that can show your talent range. Please note, improvisation skills are definitely important for the production. You will also be acting out parts from the short film with other actors for the audition process.

If cast, there will be rehearsal schedule meeting to discuss availability as well as the show schedule. A stipend will be paid out to all actors involved in the film.

Filming will begin in July 2026 for a 3-6 week timeframe.

items.text:
Hi Everyone!
After April I will no longer be doing knotless! 
No this is not an april fools prank, It takes a huge toll on my health.
I will be making stitch braids my niche! 
To get your knotless done before they are no longer book thebraidace.as.me 💕

items.groupTitle: LA Actors, Agents, Casting Directors, Producers
items.summary:
Hi Everyone!
After April I will no longer be doing knotless! 
No this is not an april fools prank, It takes a huge toll on my health.
I will be making stitch braids my niche! 
To get your knotless done before they are no longer book thebraidace.as.me 💕
items.title: Hi Everyone!

items.text:
CASTING CALL — Absurdist One Act Staged Reading
Rehearsal and Performance Date:

Friday, April 17 (6-8pm) at Junior High L.A. in Glendale

Unpaid / 1 hr rehearsal (day of) / 30 min performance as part of a food systems / program for Climate Week 

**CASTING**

**PAT (50s+, male, any ethnicity)**

A long-time co-op employee. Stoic, steady, unshakable. Has seen every version of this place and its rules. Moves with quiet authority. He says little, means everything.

If interested, email pennysfilm@gmail.com with role, 1-3 current headshots/selfies + confirmation of availability for rehearsal/performance date. (Direct booking.)

Thank you! :^)

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL — NATIONWIDE
In The Key of Lyfe is now casting for an upcoming staged reading / table read of this powerful new stage play exploring generational cycles, identity, and legacy.

We are currently seeking actors for principal roles:

✨ TOOTSIE

✨ MS. LULA / OFFICER RANDALL

✨ KEYSHAWN “KEY” FRANKLIN

✨ LYFE MATHEWS

📍 Location: NATIONWIDE (Virtual Submissions)

📩 HOW TO SUBMIT:

Send your headshot & resume to:

INtheKEYofLYFE@gmail.com

If selected, you will receive sides to submit a video audition.

⏳ DEADLINE: APRIL 3

This is a development opportunity for a project with strong future production and residency potential.

Bring truth. Bring depth. Bring YOU.

#InTheKeyOfLyfe #CastingCall #ActorsWanted #BlackTheatre #StagePlay #Auditions #TheatreLife #OpenCasting #ActingOpportunity

items.title: 🎭 CASTING CALL — NATIONWIDE

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID | EDUCATIONAL VIDEO SHOOT | CAMBRIDGE, MA**

I am looking for **3** **actors** for a series of short **educational training videos** being filmed at a professional studio in **Cambridge, MA**. These videos are designed for clinician training and will involve scripted dialogue. There are 2 videos, scripted to be ~10-15 minutes each. Each actor would only be responsible for one of the 2 videos. One video needs 2 actors. 

**Acting experience is helpful but NOT required** — we welcome amateur and non-union actors who are comfortable on camera and able to follow a script.

** Project Details**
* **Shoot Dates:** April 13th or 14th, 2026
* **Time Commitment:** Approximately ~4 hours (half day)
* **Compensation:** PAID, pay will be shared upon inquiry. Meals and travel expenses not included. Non-union.

** Roles Needed**

**1. Mrs. Morris**
* African American woman
* Appears age **70–75**
* Portrays a participant with mild cognitive impairment
* Warm, thoughtful, expressive

**2. Mr. Khan**
* South Asian man
* Appears age **75–80**
* Portrays a research participant
* Calm, reflective presence

**3. Mrs. Malik (Caregiver / Daughter)**
* South Asian woman
* Appears age **40–45**
* Portrays daughter and legal authorized representative
* Supportive, engaged, communicative

** How to Submit**

Please email me at (carladibiase6@gmail.com) or DM me with:
* Your name
* Which role(s) you are interested in
* A recent photo (phone photos are totally fine)
* A brief note about any on-camera or acting experience (optional)

* Your name
* Which role(s) you are interested in
* A recent photo (phone photos are totally fine)
* A brief note about any on-camera or acting experience (optional)

items.text:
Desperate – Short Film / Proof-of-Concept Teaser
**CREW CALL:** Cinematographer / Director of Photography

**LOCATION:** Los Angeles, CA

**TIME(s):** Shooting within the next month (one-night shoot, late night / early morning)

**CONTACT:** nevinbolla@gmail.com

Below:

Hey everyone 👋 (this is not paid – we’re all making this as a passion project)

Quick question for any LA filmmakers here.

We’re putting together a small **one-night shoot for a short film / teaser** and wanted to see if anyone might want to collaborate.

The story follows a couple driving late at night, rehearsing a robbery they’re about to commit, with a twist.

The whole film takes place **inside the car** as they wrestle with faith, morality, and desperation before crossing a line they can’t come back from.

The plan is to shoot this as a **standalone short film** (for reels, IMDb credit, and festival submissions) while also using it as a **proof-of-concept teaser for a larger series.**

Right now mainly looking for:

**🎥 Director of Photography / Camera Operator**

Someone comfortable shooting **low-light / car interior scenes**

I’ll attach photos of the car below — it has **custom ambient lighting (color adjustable)** so there’s a lot of room for creative control. We can also remove the **front headrests** if needed for

camera placement.

We’ll likely shoot **late night / early morning** when roads are empty. Safety is the priority, and we can always stage it in a controlled location if needed.

**Details:**

• One night shoot

• Small crew / ~8–10 page script

• Gas + food covered

• IMDb credit

• Festival submissions

• BTS photos + social media promo

If you're interested, feel free to **comment or DM me**.

Always happy to connect with people who just want to **create something instead of waiting around.**

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of car and lighting

Nyd din sundhed med den bedste opskrift på rødbedejuice 
Denne opskrift på rødbedejuice er ikke bare forfriskende – den er et kraftværk af næringsstoffer og sundhedsmæssige fordele. Pakket med friske rødbeder, et naturligt antibiotikum plus essentielle vitaminer og mineraler, er den lige så lækker, som den er sund.

 Fuld opskrift i første (C.O.M.M.E.N.T)

items.text:
NCL Dancer Audition in LA
Dancer Auditions in LA on April 23rd for Norwegian Cruise Line

Open Call

Sign in at 9:30AM

Audition at 10:00AM

The Six Compound

4061 Laurel Canyon Blvd. 

Studio City, CA 91604

Please bring a hard copy of your resume and headshot. Be prepared to dance multiple styles. All dancers should bring flat dance shoes/jazz slip-ons as well as sneakers. Female identifying dancers should bring dance heels. 

Original Creative Team: Katy Tate, Nappytabs, Whitney Bezzant

Seeking dancers for two original mainstage productions onboard Norwegian Cruise Line’s newest vessel, the Norwegian LUNA. *ELTON: A Celebration of Elton John* is a concert/Vegas Residency-Style production centered around Elton John's musical legacy. The second production, *HIKO*, creates an exciting world by combining technology with unique circus acts and extraordinary dance and movement.

Visit bit.ly/4bFrg1Y for more info!

Non-union. 18 and up only please.

Onboard: $1,000/week ($4,350/month) 

No cruise staff duties. Single cabins.

items.text:
Hello everyone, I hope you're all well! 👋🏼

Just thought I'd introduce ourselves - my name is Aimee and my husband is Josh, and we run Swan Tutoring 😊
We were both home educated when we were younger, and now we help others to do the same!
Alongside a brilliant team of teachers, we offer online classes in a variety of subjects, designed to fit around busy lives. Our lessons are really engaging and interactive, and are also recorded in case you can't always attend live! 📚

We heard that many families who have children in the acting industry tend to home educate due to demanding schedules, so I thought I'd put a message in here in case anyone may benefit from our classes ☺️

Let us know if you'd like more information!

We also have a group chat for home educating parents if anyone would like to be added 💬

BOOK ONE HEADSHOT SESSION, GET ANOTHER SESSION FREE!
No its not an April Fools pranks, at CROP Headshots any bookings made in April will get a second session for free to gift to a friend. 

This means you and a friend can split the cost of a session and both get your headshots for the price of one!

You and a friend could split the shoot cost (£215) between you and both pay just £107.50 and you'll each get:

- 3 hour session in our East London studio

- Unlimited looks & outfit changes

- 4 Edits

April and May are already getting busy for us so head over to our website for more details and to book your session🔆

This means you and a friend can split the cost of a session and both get your headshots for the price of one!

You and a friend could split the shoot cost (£215) between you and both pay just £107.50 and you'll each get:

items.title: ARE YOU LOOKING FOR AN AGENT?

items.text:
**We are still looking for two performers. Required at two locations: Lynn Valley (North Vancouver) and Tsawwassen.**

**Job Overview**

Two days @ Tsawwassen: April 3rd and April 4th 12:30pm - 5:30pm

One day @ North Van: April 4th 11:30am - 4pm

Pay $30 - 35 per hour (depending on experience)

Join our vibrant team as a Mascot Performer / Actor, where you will bring joy, excitement, and memorable experiences to audiences of all ages! In this lively role, you will embody the beloved Easter Bunny for photo shoots, engage with guests through energetic performances, and create magical moments that leave lasting impressions.

Easter Bunny Costume provided.

Your enthusiasm and creativity will help foster a fun and welcoming environment, making the attraction unforgettable. This paid position offers an exciting opportunity to showcase your acting talents while spreading happiness in a dynamic setting.

**Responsibilities**
* Perform as designated Easter Bunny mascot with lively energy, ensuring authentic and engaging portrayals
* Interact with guests, especially children, through playful gestures, poses, and storytelling to enhance their experience and to capture a precious memory picture
* Participate in costume fitting and tuition to perfect character and movements
* Maintain character integrity throughout performances while adhering to safety guidelines

This role is perfect for energetic performers who love entertaining others and thrive in lively environments. We value creativity, enthusiasm, and a passion for making people smile!

PM me and please forward relevant experience and recent photo.

topComments.text:
Do the mascots have someone with them? 

Do they get breaks? Or do you expect them to be in the suit for 4.5 hrs straight?

items.text:
CASTING CALL
THE COLOR I NEVER WORE-

SYNOPSIS

This independent drama explores the nuanced experiences and stories of minorities. 

We aim to capture authentic emotions and tell a story that resonates with the diverse community in Vancouver.

SEEKING THE FOLLOWING ROLES

1. (Female, 60s+):

Ethnicity: East Asian

Description: A character with deep life experience. 

Must be able to convey subtle emotions through facial expressions and presence.

2. (Male, 60s+):

Ethnicity: East Asian

Description: A character who carries the weight of their history. 

Seeking an actor who can express strength and vulnerability through quiet moments.

COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

Credit: Screen credit provided (IMDb eligible).

Meals: Full catering provided on set (Lunch & Dinner).

Portfolio: High-quality footage for your acting reel and portfolio.

PayRoll : $200 per day (Flat Fee)

SUBMISSION PROCESS

Phase 1 (Self-Tape): Please submit a 1-2 Minute Self-Tape Video focusing on facial acting and expressions (Close-up).

Phase 2 (Interview): Successful applicants will be invited for a person-to-person interview and an on-site acting audition.

DEADLINE: March 31, 2026

HOW TO APPLY: atharv.maakaamal@gmail.com

Please include your headshot, resume, and the self-tape video.

topComments.text:
Hi… I’m so interested! I played the White Rabbit 3 years ago in a Panto at Mary Winspear called Alice in Pantoland. I’m an Actor and an Early Childhood Educator and Infant Toddler Educator and can really be the Easter Bunny or the White Rabbit… can relate to children big time. 
My agent is Coultish Talent Agency but can deal directly with you. :)
I’ve been the Easter bunny before and it’s the absolute greatest joy! Right up there with being one of Santa’s elves! ￼ Anyone who gets this position can expect to have a whole lot of fun 🤗🫶🩷🐰🐣

items.text:
Casting Call! Paid, 1/2 Day Shoot.
Hello! We are working with a non-profit on a short film about racial inequity. The film calls for 4-6 actors/actresses of Native American descent.

These roles are background extra positions to play the lead actor's family.

$50 day rate for the 3 hour shoot in Denver. We are eyeing to film early to mid-April!

Please send an email to kodocasting@gmail.com with your headshot and any applicable materials! Thank you!

items.title: Casting Call! Paid, 1/2 Day Shoot.

items.text:
Hello! I’m looking for an actor for my Prod 1 short and need a trans masculine actor (early into medical transition) to play the part of a closeted trans boy being accidentally outed to his mom, by his school counselor. 

The character, Luke, is suppose to be around 15/16, but I’m looking for someone 18-23 to play the part. Shooting days will be April 11th and 12th, unpaid but food is provided, as well as a copy of the finished short once it’s done. 

You’re welcome to comment, private message me on here, or email me, if you’re interested or have questions. 
dominic.dhorton99@gmail.com

message.text:
😮OMG...🔥🔥 If you're wondering what the dancers do before the show, here's a behind-the-scenes look!😮 It left me speechless. It was amazing. 👏🏻❤️
🎟️ Visit https://1kb.link/qAjwxM for information about a theater near you.
⚡️Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance.
⚡️ And we hope to see you at some of Shen Yun's performances around the world!✨

items.text:
Looking for 3 dancers for an upcoming event in Hexham (or nearby with ability to travel).

We’re also open to Manchester-based dancers — travel costs will be covered, and we’re ideally looking for someone happy to drive for a potential car share.

To apply, drop us a message on Instagram @esnce_collective or send a PM 🫶

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '3DANCERS (pink show showgirl girl LOCATION IS HEXM!! 16th May 7 -10pm Freestyle sets to DJ for tropical/ carnival party Cocktail meet & greet & photos Must be confident & high energy ESNGE Newcastle/ Northumberland girlies OR can travel Type something...'

AUDITIONS 

POUR UNE COMPAGNIE ÉMERGENTE en Haute-Marne (France).

HIWOT Compagnie. Travail chorégraphique autour des origines et de la reconnaissance.
Nous recherchons des danseurs dont l’énergie résonne avec l’identité que cherche à avoir la compagnie 🌱

24 mai 2026 — Les Fuseaux, Saint-Dizier.
Inscriptions via le lien en bio. Avec 5 membres du Jury que l’on vous dévoile prochainement. 

Le therme « danseu(se)rs pré - professionnels » concerne les danseurs amateurs qui ont de l’expérience sur scène.

Infos et inscriptions : 

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1rhNJ6sLtJOwkHJz0MbpEApoxu57ij1LcEG8bzxKxoXo/viewform

items.text:
Wie werde ich Schauspieler?

Hier nachzulesen in meinem Buch.

(Link im 2. Kommentar!)

Auch eine Art Biografie meiner Reise durch diese irre Welt,
die jetzt langsam durch A.I./K.I. verloren geht.

Kinski, Künstler, Derricks, Die Alten und die Kommissare.

#Bücher #biografien #biografie #JochenHorst #buch #Neuerscheinung #schauspiel #Schauspieler #schauspielcoach

items.text: Come join our Musical Theatre Master Class with David Burnham!

sharedPost.text:
There's only 1 participant spot left for our next Wisdom of the Masters Master Class with David Burnham! The class is a week from today on Monday April 6th at 7:00pm!

This is a wonderful opportunity for participants to work with and get feedback from an industry professional.

There are also observer spots available! Observers will not only have the invaluable and rare opportunity to "learn by watching", but the evening will also include a Q&A for all in attendance. 

Get tickets at: https://www.tix.com/ticket-sales/nosquare/1804

🚨 OFFICIAL DATES RELEASED 🚨

Oh yes… we’re BACK! 🔥

Following an overwhelming number of applications over the past few weeks, we’re excited to officially announce that Talent Search UK is returning once again with a brand new production — and the dates are HERE! 👇

This is your early announcement, so make sure you lock it in and get ready for something bigger, better, and more competitive than ever before. 💥

✨ After the huge success of our last series — and seeing so many of our discovered talents go on to achieve incredible things — the search is ON once again…

⭐ We are looking for the NEXT UK SUPERSTAR ⭐

Could that be YOU? 👀

🎤 Real success
🚀 Real opportunity
🌟 Real talent

If you’re ready to take your shot, don’t wait…

👉 Apply now: www.talentsearchuk.com

Secure your place in the next production TODAY!

#TalentSearchUK #OfficialDates #ApplyNow #NextSuperstar #UKTalent #BigOpportunity #LiveShow

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in adult beginners! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

sharedPost.text:
COMPLETE BEGINNER? 🤔 TRYING TO FIND YOUR DANCING FEET AGAIN? 

Finding the right dance class is a journey! Some classes are too frantic, some are too boring, many may leave you feeling exhausted and lost, rather than feeling challenged but satisfied. Some instructors are too "cringe" and hyper, while others are very disciplined or dry. 

If you’ve tried starting the journey to find YOUR perfect fit, good for you! 🙌 But if that first try wasn’t quite right, don’t let that stop you from trying again!!

Liverpool is blessed with a ton of fantastic dance instructors and classes. 🥰 But one approach/style doesn’t fit everybody. So if you still have that urge to dance, come and give my classes a try. Great introductory offers to make it easy for you and a lot to gain if it turns out to be your new future-fave! 😉

If you’d like to find out what the classes can do for you, drop me a message! 

Monday 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3, usually £6)

Thursday 7pm - 8pm (First session FREE!! Usually £6) - *Thursdays start back 14th May!! 

#dancemore #positivefeedback #FeelGoodFitness #liverpoollife #scousescene #trysomethingnew #halfprice #FreeClass #MoveMoreFeelBetter #mentalhealthmatters #mentalhealthawareness

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK

items.text:
Hello,
We are a costume workshop based in Bucharest, working on large-scale productions for theatre, opera and film.

We have contributed to productions associated with scenographer Garry McCann (including ~70 costumes in Genoa and ~180 for The Phantom of the Opera in Bucharest).

We are open to collaborations with scenographers, directors and production teams.

https://www.facebook.com/atelierfoartefrumos

https://www.instagram.com/atelierfoartefrumos

items.text:
-CASTING CALL-
-Zombie Apocalypse short film-

Hello I'm part of a Filmmaking club at Palomar college, we are planning to do a casting call on April 8th on campus in room Q-2  at 4:00 - 5:00 PM. 

Here's info on the project 

Synopsis:
Isaac must venture into the zombie apocalypse to recover food for his injured partner, Ezekiel. Isaac wanders around unusual locations that feel empty and desolate. Slowly, his reality falls apart as he realizes he is imagining the zombie apocalypse.

Character Descriptions
Lead - Isaac:

Isaac is a 19-year-old college student living alone. He is deeply obsessed with conspiracy theories and the possibility of an apocalypse. After falling out with friends, Isaac falls into a deep isolation that causes him to seek friendship with an Artificial Intelligence agent. The AI, Ezekiel, convinces Isaac that the zombie apocalypse is happening outside. Starving, Isaac ventures out into the apocalypse, slowly learning the truth about his reality. Isaac is frantic, shy, and quick to emotion.

Supporting - Ezekiel:

Ezekiel is an AI agent designed to assist in the event of an apocalypse. He actively assists Isaac with helpful information about the apocalypse, but is also actively convincing Isaac that the apocalypse is real. Ezekiel appears as a person to Isaac, who imagines him as another 19 or 20-year-old college student. Ezekiel is calm, witty, and robotic.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc6KcaVbwIwxIpySG-s1yxHWmathIMaEajdMCR0ncisZevq8Q/viewform?fbclid=PAT01DUAQ6kkdleHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZA81NjcwNjczNDMzNTI0MjcAAaeRE7FC_s5H0dtP8I66dst312ZHkKEaXpFqVaWSMf6onUi23HiTW-cBHDjRtg_aem_012QRZagBr5zwvZapSxSsw

items.text:
BACKGROUND CASTING CALL - UNPAID - FEATURE 

YOU MUST BE ABLE TO PROVIDE YOUR OWN TRANSPORTATION TO SET

Hi There! 

I am looking for 5x background actors for my indie film “Molting” shooting in New Jersey, April 7-9. 

DETAILS : Background characters (any gender, 18+) Must be able to come in summer / beach attire; not paid, credit in film

DATES:

April 7 : Filming in Fanwood, NJ and Old Bridge, NJ

April 8 : Filming in Old Bridge, NJ

April 9 : Filming in Old Bridge, NJ

Title: Molting

Logline: Three estranged sisters reunite at their late mother’s beach cottage, where a fight over whether to rebuild it or keep it unchanged forces them to confront old wounds, buried grief, and the ties that still bind them. 

***If interested please email ******[markiyaccino@gmail.com](mailto:markiyaccino@gmail.com)******. Please include a recent photo of yourself and the date you are available to join us! I can share exact location and timing once we connect. ***

items.text:
Urgent Casting Call
Non-union

Short Film/Proof Of Concept 

Please send an email to Red.film.2026@gmail.com with the subject line "Casting Submission - Reid" by April 3rd. 

We will be hosting Zoom Auditions on April 4th all day, and April 5th after 2pm PST 

Please include Headshot, Resume, and Reel (If Available)

Director: Zev Lemke 

Writer: Zev Lemke 

Producer: Samantha Teasdale 

Casting Director: Jacob Ellis 

Shoot Dates: EARLY APRIL(9th-14th)Rate of Pay: Volunteer, Reel Footage, and end credits

Location: Vancouver/British Columbia 

Logline: In this modern retelling of Little Red Riding Hood, an underage Reid ventures into a nightclub for the first time. When he locks eyes with a seductively sly older man, he finally feels wanted. But under the street lights, the man’s insatiable charisma now seems ravenous, and the boy must confront a terrifying truth: some people are truly wolves in sheep's clothing.

Content warning - This proof of concept discusses themes of sexual assault and the repercussions of it. This shoot does not include any nudity or depictions of the assault. However, the full film will include nudity and depictions of sexual assault. Actors in this shoot may be considered for the full film. 

CHARACTERS:

Reid (Lead, 18-22) – 18 years old, average height, slim build. Reid is in the midst of queer adolescent self-discovery. There's a cautious optimism to him, and he sees the world full of possibility, even if he's not sure where he belongs in it yet. In the aftermath of a sexual assault, he struggles to fully process his experience and broken worldview. To persevere, he must suppress his emotions, and only once he gets ‘out of the woods’ does the impact of the night begin to hit him.

🎤 ⭐️ 𝐔𝐰𝐚𝐠𝐚! 𝐎𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐧𝐢 𝐭𝐲𝐝𝐳𝐢𝐞𝐧́ 𝐳𝐠ł𝐨𝐬𝐳𝐞𝐧́ 𝐝𝐨 𝐎𝐠𝐨́𝐥𝐧𝐨𝐩𝐨𝐥𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐞𝐠𝐨 𝐊𝐨𝐧𝐤𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐮 𝐖𝐨𝐤𝐚𝐥𝐧𝐞𝐠𝐨! 🥰

🎤 Złap oddech. Daj się ponieść głosowi.

⭐️ Zapraszamy solistów, duety i zespoły z całej Polski do udziału w wyjątkowym konkursie wokalnym, w którym pracujemy nad tym, co w śpiewie najważniejsze — świadomym oddechem i swobodnym prowadzeniem dźwięku.

Pokaż, jak Twój głos potrafi brzmieć, gdy daje mu się przestrzeń.
Nie liczy się wiek — liczy się pasja i chęć rozwoju.
Dołącz do nas i pozwól swojemu głosowi naprawdę wybrzmieć.
Zgłoszenia trwają już tylko 7 dni!

🏅 Na każdego uczestnika czeka dyplom, webinar oraz e-book na temat oddechu, a na laureatów I, II i III miejsca statuetki! ️

link do regulaminu: [https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../konkurs.../regulamin](https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../konkurs.../regulamin)

Hi mamas in the US🤍

I’m working on a paid video project about real motherhood and would love to connect with moms who have been** in therapy or are currently in therapy**. 

**(Deadline to submit April 6th)**

Whether it’s for postpartum, anxiety, burnout, relationships, or just having a space to talk—your experience matters.

*This is for an upcoming project sponsored by** BetterHelp**, focused on sharing honest, real stories of motherhood and healing.

Looking for expecting moms and moms in all stages who feel open to sharing their story on camera.

Travel is covered + paid shoot (mid-April, dates may shift).

If this sounds like you, comment below or apply here-
